title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TANAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL BUILDING NO. 1 IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANAY, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO PATRICIO JARIN MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 12070 / 65 OG No. 9, 2074 (March 3, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5031, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TANAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL BUILDING NO. 1 IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANAY, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO PATRICIO JARIN MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Tanay Elementary School Building No. 1 in the Municipality of Tanay, Province of Rizal, is hereby changed to Patricio Jarin Memorial .Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
